steps.title: Recognize what 0.35 represents
steps.content: The expression $0.35x$ means 0.35 of the original quantity. Converting to a percentage: $0.35 = \frac{35}{100} = 35\%$. So 35% of the original quantity remains.

steps.title: Calculate the percent decrease
steps.content:
If 35% remains, then the percent that was removed is:
$$100\% - 35\% = 65\%$$
That matches Choice D — $65\%$.
